isi.lyrics:
Lyric Elaine - Remember Me

Romanization

I’d like to think I’m someone
‘Cuz it’s too hard sometimes
Believing I’m just passing here

I’d like to be better when I’m older
Who can make everything alright
I hope they’ll miss me when I’m gone

Would you remember me, my name, my voice?
Would you let me stay in your memory?

After I’m gone, hope there’s more love
Hope you’ll feel me with you
After I’m gone, hope there’s more love
Hope you’ll feel me with you
Remember me

I’d like to leave this place a little better
Maybe put a little smile on you
That’s mainly why I do this

Would you remember me, my name, my voice?
Would you let me stay in your memory?

After I’m gone, hope there’s more love
Hope you’ll feel me with you
After I’m gone, hope there’s more love
Hope you’ll feel me with you

I don’t need a lot of space
Just a corner of your heart
When things get hard just take me out
Wherever you are whenever you need
Remember me

After I’m gone, hope there’s more love
Hope you’ll feel me with you
After I’m gone, hope there’s more love
Hope you’ll feel me with you
Remember me


Hangeul

I’d like to think I’m someone
‘Cuz it’s too hard sometimes
Believing I’m just passing here

I’d like to be better when I’m older
Who can make everything alright
I hope they’ll miss me when I’m gone

Would you remember me, my name, my voice?
Would you let me stay in your memory?

After I’m gone, hope there’s more love
Hope you’ll feel me with you
After I’m gone, hope there’s more love
Hope you’ll feel me with you
Remember me

I’d like to leave this place a little better
Maybe put a little smile on you
That’s mainly why I do this

Would you remember me, my name, my voice?
Would you let me stay in your memory?

After I’m gone, hope there’s more love
Hope you’ll feel me with you
After I’m gone, hope there’s more love
Hope you’ll feel me with you

I don’t need a lot of space
Just a corner of your heart
When things get hard just take me out
Wherever you are whenever you need
Remember me

After I’m gone, hope there’s more love
Hope you’ll feel me with you
After I’m gone, hope there’s more love
Hope you’ll feel me with you
Remember me

isi.driveFileNames: Elaine - I Will Always Miss You.mp3
isi.lyrics:
Lyric Elaine - I Will Always Miss You

Romanization

My heart stops with your text
Takes me a while to get back up
My friend said I’d get over you
But I will always miss you

I hate that you’re part of me
I hate that you’re hurting me now
That I have no choice but to let you go

I hate that you’re not here
I hate that you’re fine
But I have no choice but to let you go
When I still miss you

No, I won’t call you my ex
It’ll take me a while to give us up
And I’m sorry I realise only now
That I will always miss you

I hate that you’re part of me
I hate that you’re hurting me now
That I have no choice but to let you go

I hate that you left me
I hate that you’re fine
But I have no choice but to let you go
When I still miss you

Why would I live if you’ve gone
Why would I laugh if you’ve gone
Why would I dream if you’re gone
So tell me now, is this the end?

I hate that you’re part of me
I hate that you’re hurting me now
That I have no choice but to let you go

I hate that you’re not here
I hate that you’re fine
But I have no choice but to let you go
When I still miss you

I will always miss you


Hangeul

My heart stops with your text
Takes me a while to get back up
My friend said I’d get over you
But I will always miss you

I hate that you’re part of me
I hate that you’re hurting me now
That I have no choice but to let you go

I hate that you’re not here
I hate that you’re fine
But I have no choice but to let you go
When I still miss you

No, I won’t call you my ex
It’ll take me a while to give us up
And I’m sorry I realise only now
That I will always miss you

I hate that you’re part of me
I hate that you’re hurting me now
That I have no choice but to let you go

I hate that you left me
I hate that you’re fine
But I have no choice but to let you go
When I still miss you

Why would I live if you’ve gone
Why would I laugh if you’ve gone
Why would I dream if you’re gone
So tell me now, is this the end?

I hate that you’re part of me
I hate that you’re hurting me now
That I have no choice but to let you go

I hate that you’re not here
I hate that you’re fine
But I have no choice but to let you go
When I still miss you

I will always miss you

isi.lyrics:
Lyric Elaine - I′m Sorry Too

Romanization

I’ve made up my mind
I choose you for the rest of my life
I mean it, I’m all in

I have so much love to give
I want you at the receiving end
You’re my dream, you’re my dream

Bleeding in a dance
You stopped playing it

Say that you’re sorry
Well yeah, I’m sorry too
You might blame me
Well yeah, I blame you too
I was up and down a thousand times a day
You think I put you through hell, but you did the same
Well yeah, I’m sorry too

How freeing it feels
To be rid of right and wrong
Accept you, all of you

I was stuck in my head for too long
All I had to do was to dive in
Forgive you, and love you

Bleeding in a dance
You stopped playing it

Say that you’re sorry
Well yeah, I’m sorry too
You might blame me
Well yeah, I blame you too
I was up and down a thousand times a day
You think I put you through hell, but you did the same
Well yeah, I’m sorry too


Hangeul

I’ve made up my mind
I choose you for the rest of my life
I mean it, I’m all in

I have so much love to give
I want you at the receiving end
You’re my dream, you’re my dream

Bleeding in a dance
You stopped playing it

Say that you’re sorry
Well yeah, I’m sorry too
You might blame me
Well yeah, I blame you too
I was up and down a thousand times a day
You think I put you through hell, but you did the same
Well yeah, I’m sorry too

How freeing it feels
To be rid of right and wrong
Accept you, all of you

I was stuck in my head for too long
All I had to do was to dive in
Forgive you, and love you

Bleeding in a dance
You stopped playing it

Say that you’re sorry
Well yeah, I’m sorry too
You might blame me
Well yeah, I blame you too
I was up and down a thousand times a day
You think I put you through hell, but you did the same
Well yeah, I’m sorry too

isi.lyrics:
Lyric Elaine - How Good

Romanization

I need you close
I can’t, when you go
You make me whole
I don’t want no one else

Checking my phone
Have you come home
Why don’t you know?
Baby, you’re all I need

I can’t be left alone I wanna kiss you
We don’t have to talk just wanna kiss you

I spend all day dreaming of what we do when we’re together
How good we’re together, how good
I spend all night missing of what we do when we’re together
How good we’re together, how good, how good

Time flies slow
When’s tomorrow
Been feeling low
When you gon hold me?

Want you to show
You love me so
Did you have to go?
Baby, you’re all I need

I can’t be left alone I wanna kiss you
We don’t have to talk just wanna kiss you

isi.driveFileNames: Elaine - Where Did It All Go.mp3
isi.lyrics:
Lyric Elaine - Where Did It All Go

Romanization

Where did it all go
My only radio
Where did it all go
My only radio

Always I had it with me
Always it would sing to me
Sweet summer’s melody

Always within arms’ reach
Always kept me company
Red and gold autumn leaves

Where did it all go
My only radio
Where did it all go
My only radio

Words have its limit
To paint what I’m feeling
I’m missing lovers’ spring

It left a hole in me
Nothing can fill it
My warmth in winter chill

Where did it all go
My only radio
Where did it all go
My only radio

Where did it all go
My only radio
Where did it all go
My only radio


Hangeul

Where did it all go
My only radio

Always it would sing to me

Words have its limit

It left a hole in me

Where did it all go

My only radio

Where did it all go
My only radio
Where did it all go
My only radio

isi.lyrics:
Lyric LeSon - need u back

Romanization

oneul chorahage anja inneun nan
i bireul banggimyeo
ne saenggage jamgyeo
heodeogigo balbeodungchineun geureon naringga bwa

nan jigeum ppyeoga neomu apa
yeopen ne malgu chadi chan baram ppuniya
naega joahaneun matcha tearo
wiro ttawin jeoldae andwae

haruharu neol geurimyeo sara nan
geunyang gwaenchantagoman malhan geoya

My love
I think I need u back
dasi jom wajullae
ajik natseol tende
naega yeope eomneun neo

heojeonhaji anni?
naega piryohajin anni?
You belong to me

chagaun bitsogen nega isseoseo
neoreul chatna bwa

I’m deeply lost right now
nan chueok soge salgo isseo
yeojeonhi

My love
I think I need u back
dasi jom wajullae
ajik natseol tende
naega yeope eomneun neo

heojeonhaji anni?
naega piryohajin anni?
You belong to me


Hangeul

오늘 초라하게 앉아 있는 난
이 비를 반기며
네 생각에 잠겨
허덕이고 발버둥치는 그런 날인가 봐

난 지금 뼈가 너무 아파
옆엔 네 말구 차디 찬 바람 뿐이야
내가 좋아하는 matcha tea로
위로 따윈 절대 안돼

하루하루 널 그리며 살아 난
그냥 괜찮다고만 말한 거야

My love
I think I need u back
다시 좀 와줄래
아직 낯설 텐데
내가 옆에 없는 너

허전하지 않니?
내가 필요하진 않니?
You belong to me

차가운 빗속엔 네가 있어서
너를 찾나 봐

I’m deeply lost right now
난 추억 속에 살고 있어
여전히

My love
I think I need u back
다시 좀 와줄래
아직 낯설 텐데
내가 옆에 없는 너

허전하지 않니?
내가 필요하진 않니?
You belong to me

isi.driveFileNames: Kang Min Hee - 잘 지내지 마 (Don’t Be Okay Without Me).mp3
isi.albums: 잘 지내지 마 (Don’t Be Okay Without Me)
isi.lyrics:
Lyric Kang Min Hee - 잘 지내지 마 (Don’t Be Okay Without Me)

Romanization

useumyeo insahaetji
heeojimi iksukhan geotcheoreom
jeongmal gwaenchaneul georago
ne apeseo useumyeo malhaetji geuttaen

amuraedo ige matneun geot gatdamyeo
neoege jeongmal jal jinaerago malhaetjiman

na eopsi jal jinaeji ma
haengbokhajido ma
ireoge naman apeuge mandeul georamyeon
sasil geuboda deo sireun geon
nega na eopsido
neomu pyeonanhalkka bwa
jeongmal haengbokhalkka bwa
geuge duryeowo

eoneu nal mundeuk neowa
majuchilkka geobi nagido hae
nan tto babocheoreom
jal jinaeran malhago
geuphi dwidoragagetjiman

na eopsi jal jinaeji ma
haengbokhajido ma
ireoge naman apeuge mandeul georamyeon
sasil geuboda deo sireun geon
nega na eopsido
neomu pyeonanhalkka bwa
jeongmal haengbokhalkka bwa
geuge duryeowo

tto nugunggal mannaseo
nameun gieongmajeo
jiwogagetji neon
amureoji aneun deusi

geurae imi kkeutnan urijiman
doedollil sun eopgetjiman
jal jinael jasini eomneunggeol

na eopsi jal jinaegetji
neon bummyeong geureol geoya
naneun geujeo neoegeneun geuppunil teni
jeongmal mueopboda sireun geon
dareun nugunggawa
nal da jiwonaelkka bwa
geureoge ithyeojilkka bwa
geuge duryeoun geoya

Hangeul

웃으며 인사했지
헤어짐이 익숙한 것처럼
정말 괜찮을 거라고
네 앞에서 웃으며 말했지 그땐

아무래도 이게 맞는 것 같다며
너에게 정말 잘 지내라고 말했지만

나 없이 잘 지내지 마
행복하지도 마
이렇게 나만 아프게 만들 거라면
사실 그보다 더 싫은 건
네가 나 없이도
너무 편안할까 봐
정말 행복할까 봐
그게 두려워

어느 날 문득 너와
마주칠까 겁이 나기도 해
난 또 바보처럼
잘 지내란 말하고
급히 뒤돌아가겠지만

나 없이 잘 지내지 마
행복하지도 마
이렇게 나만 아프게 만들 거라면
사실 그보다 더 싫은 건
네가 나 없이도
너무 편안할까 봐
정말 행복할까 봐
그게 두려워

또 누군갈 만나서
남은 기억마저
지워가겠지 넌
아무렇지 않은 듯이

그래 이미 끝난 우리지만
되돌릴 순 없겠지만
잘 지낼 자신이 없는걸

나 없이 잘 지내겠지
넌 분명 그럴 거야
나는 그저 너에게는 그뿐일 테니
정말 무엇보다 싫은 건
다른 누군가와
날 다 지워낼까 봐
그렇게 잊혀질까 봐
그게 두려운 거야

정말 행복할까 봐
그게 두려워

또 누군갈 만나서
남은 기억마저
지워가겠지 넌
아무렇지 않은 듯이

그래 이미 끝난 우리지만
되돌릴 순 없겠지만
잘 지낼 자신이 없는걸

나 없이 잘 지내겠지
넌 분명 그럴 거야
나는 그저 너에게는 그뿐일 테니
정말 무엇보다 싫은 건
다른 누군가와
날 다 지워낼까 봐
그렇게 잊혀질까 봐
그게 두려운 거야

isi.lyrics:
Lyric Kwon Jin Ah - Your Other Name (너의 또 다른 이름)

Romanization

ppyojokhan dolmengi, geuge naui dareun ireumieonne
modureul dachige hae, nado moreuge
tteugeopge heureuneun geugeon naege eoulliji ana
chorogui gyejeoldo heudeureojin bomdo
tto sarangiraneun geu maldo

geureon nareul neon tteugeopge ana
ireon nareul neon nummullo jeoksyeojune
eoreobuteun sesang sok chagapge sigeogadeon
nal gieoi kkot piuryeo

heuteojineun yeonggi, geugeosi neoui ireumieonna
jamsi maemdoldaga got sarajigetji
meotdaero apjilleogan maeumman namgyeodun chae

geureon nuneuro boji ma nareul
geureon eolgullo nae ireum bureuji ma
illeongineun tteollimdo millyeooneun apeumdo
geu modeun ge nan geobi na

chamajiji aneul geoya
huhoehaji aneul geoya
nan idaero neoegero dallyeoga

ijen naega neol tteugeopge ana
ireon nareul neon nummullo jeoksyeojune
eoreobuteun sesang sok chagapge sigeogadeon
nal gieoi kkot piwonne

ijen ara, neoui tto dareun ireumeul
naui gippeuma, naui gipeun seulpeuma, annyeong naui…

Hangeul

뾰족한 돌멩이, 그게 나의 다른 이름이었네
모두를 다치게 해, 나도 모르게
뜨겁게 흐르는 그건 내게 어울리지 않아
초록의 계절도 흐드러진 봄도
또 사랑이라는 그 말도

그런 나를 넌 뜨겁게 안아
이런 나를 넌 눈물로 적셔주네
얼어붙은 세상 속 차갑게 식어가던
날 기어이 꽃 피우려

흩어지는 연기, 그것이 너의 이름이었나
잠시 맴돌다가 곧 사라지겠지
멋대로 앞질러간 마음만 남겨둔 채

그런 눈으로 보지 마 나를
그런 얼굴로 내 이름 부르지 마
일렁이는 떨림도 밀려오는 아픔도
그 모든 게 난 겁이 나

참아지지 않을 거야
후회하지 않을 거야
난 이대로 너에게로 달려가

이젠 내가 널 뜨겁게 안아
이런 나를 넌 눈물로 적셔주네
얼어붙은 세상 속 차갑게 식어가던
날 기어이 꽃 피웠네

이젠 알아, 너의 또 다른 이름을
나의 기쁨아, 나의 깊은 슬픔아, 안녕 나의…

Hangeul

난 사랑이 참 어려워요
정해진 답이 없는 게
나를 울적하게 해
아직도 원망하죠

숱한 밤을 지새우며
기다렸죠

낭비하던 밤
그대만 떠올라요
반짝이는 별들 같아

오랫동안 바라왔던
그대에게 고백할래요
틀릴까 봐 두려웠던

사랑은 계산으론
풀어낼 수가 없는걸요
내 사랑에 답은 오직
그대라는 걸 알아줘요

gipeun eodum jeopyeoneseo
al su eomneun kkeullime
gakkawojine

chadichan bam
ttaseuham gadeuk millyeowa
ijen daeul geomman gata

museun iri ireonal geot gatado
duryeowohaji ma
naege gidaeeo nuneul gamado dwae

uri bamhaneureul nara
meomchwoinneun gureum sai
jigeum i sungganeul sunoa
meolli bichwooneun dalbit sogeseo

geudae nundongja
bamhaneul gata
nareul damabone

neoro gadeuk chan bam
ije cheoncheonhi nuneul tteobomyeon dwae

Hangeul

어두운 밤
깊은 어둠 저편에서
알 수 없는 끌림에
가까워지네

차디찬 밤
따스함 가득 밀려와
이젠 닿을 것만 같아

무슨 일이 일어날 것 같아도
두려워하지 마
내게 기대어 눈을 감아도 돼

우리 밤하늘을 날아
멈춰있는 구름 사이
지금 이 순간을 수놓아
멀리 비춰오는 달빛 속에서

그대 눈동자
밤하늘 같아
나를 담아보네

무슨 일이 일어날 것 같은 밤
너로 가득 찬 밤
이제 천천히 눈을 떠보면 돼

우리 밤하늘을 날아
멈춰있는 구름 사이
지금 이 순간을 수놓아
멀리 비춰오는 달빛 속에서

그대 눈동자
밤하늘 같아
나를 담아보네

우리 가장 아름다울 이 순간
영원한 이 밤
끝나지 않을
너로 가득 찬 밤
